form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Mix 5 on March 27 over 380m at this track behind Anna Rumble beaten 8 lengths (22.51). Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (22.41) over 380m at this track. Has a decent strike-rate from the draw but will need to find best.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 498m at this track beaten 12 lengths (29.38) behind Federal Tommy in a Grade 5/6 on March 24. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame two times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.52) at this track in a Mix 5, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and 12 places from 21 starts. Can feature in the finish.
